Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 169 

PART_C_PREMIUM 

LABEL: Part C Premium 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Medicare Advantage (referred to as Medicare Part C) Basic 
Plus Mandatory Supplemental Premium Rate (Net of Rebates). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The Part C premium for Medicare Advantage plans, Cost plans, and Demonstrations
